ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Name of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES team_divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season started */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* Date the regular season ended */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs started */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* Date the playoffs ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Games behind the division leader */,
  "points_scored_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., final, scheduled, postponed) */,
  "box_score_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's box score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES team_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Name of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended coaching the team (if applicable) */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing for the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player ended playing for the team (if applicable) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_box_scores" (
  "box_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_box_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_box_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
